caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with a crafting product catalog. The catalog pages feature the heading "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE" and display a product called "FROSTED FRAMES 5 DIES," which consists of several black metal cutting dies for decorative frames and shapes. The person uses their right hand to move a thin, silver metal strip across the catalog page. In the initial moments, the hand reaches across the page toward the right, and as the sequence progresses, the hand moves the metal strip downward and then partially out of view. The catalog includes images of completed craft projects, product codes, and prices, such as "Cing: 152433 $76.00." A "Stampin'" logo is partially visible at the bottom left of the page. The focus remains on the hands and the catalog throughout the clip.
